_note: All-free default, sized for an 8GB-RAM machine: small distilled/quantized tags (~1-1.5GB each) from 4 different vendors via local Ollama - no API key, no per-call cost. Install via `brew install ollama`, `brew services start ollama`, then `ollama pull <model>` for each one used above. If you're on a beefier machine, swap back to full-size tags (e.g. 'ollama:qwen3', 'ollama:deepseek-r1', 'ollama:phi4') for stronger answers. Swap any entry to 'openrouter:<slug>' or a bare OpenRouter slug (e.g. 'openai/gpt-5.1') for paid frontier models instead - check https://openrouter.ai/models for current slugs. debate_model drives advisors.py; it does not need to be one of council_models.
